summary: Completed testing of actor-related features for Khmer Dubbing app. All backend APIs working correctly after fixing Form parameter issue. Frontend Editor UI displays actors panel with Boy/Girl gender, AI voice selection, and custom voice upload correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects/{id}/upload-actor-voice - uploads custom voice for actor
PATCH /api/projects/{id} - accepts 'actors' field in update payload
PATCH /api/projects/{id} - accepts 'segments' field in update payload
POST /api/projects/{id}/transcribe-segments - returns proper error without file
GET /api/projects/{id} - returns actors array with id, label, gender, voice, custom_voice fields
Actor voice upload persists custom_voice in actor and custom_audio in segments
Frontend Editor: Actors panel displays detected actors with Boy/Girl gender icons
Frontend Editor: AI voice dropdown shows correct voices per gender
Frontend Editor: Upload Voice button present for each actor
Frontend Editor: Changing actor gender updates all related segments
Frontend Editor: Subtitle table shows speaker labels, gender as Boy/Girl, and voice status
Frontend: Landing page renders correctly with Sign In button
Frontend: Dashboard page renders when logged in with projects list
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed upload-actor-voice endpoint to use Form() for actor_id parameter
/app/backend/tests/test_actors_api.py - Created comprehensive test suite for actor APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Actor features fully implemented and tested. Backend uses Form() for multipart form data parameters. Test credentials: session token 'test_session: [REDACTED].

bug_fix_applied.issue: upload-actor-voice endpoint was receiving empty actor_id
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: FastAPI parameter actor_id was not marked as Form() field, so multipart form data was not being parsed correctly
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed 'actor_id: str = ""' to 'actor_id: str = Form("")' in server.py line 459
bug_fix_applied.verification: All 11 backend tests pass including actor voice upload and persistence tests
